meta.title: Hospital/Clinic CMS — Administrator Side Page Prompts
meta.navigation_model: Sidebar page keys (not HTTP routes); lazy-loaded views via MainAppView.show_view(page_key)

administrator_access.description: Administrator has full access to all 10 sidebar pages plus user/permission management inside Settings. Sidebar is labeled 'Admin Panel' for all logged-in users, but only Administrator role receives settings, inventory, and users permissions by default.
admin_exclusive_features: Database backup and restore (Settings → Backup & Logs)
administrator_access.note: prescriptions permission exists in backend but has no dedicated UI page; prescriptions are created via ConsultationService only.

pages.title: Login / Register
pages.prompt: Design the authentication gateway for the Clinic Management System. Users must log in with username and password before accessing the Admin Panel. Support optional self-registration that creates Doctor-role accounts by default. Provide clear error feedback for invalid credentials and a password visibility toggle.
pages.purpose: Authenticate staff and optionally register new accounts before entering the main application shell.
features: Validation and error messaging for failed login
Session initialization with role-based permissions on success

functions.name: Login
functions.description: Validate credentials via AuthService.login(); on success load user session and permissions, then navigate to MainAppView.

functions.name: Register
functions.description: Create a new user account via AppController.register(); defaults to Doctor role.

functions.name: Toggle Password Visibility
functions.description: Show or hide password field characters.

pages.title: Dashboard
pages.navigation: Sidebar → Dashboard (default landing page after login)
pages.prompt: Build an operational command center for clinic administrators. Display real-time KPIs across patients, revenue, appointments, and consultations. Include a 7-day revenue bar chart, performance benchmarks, inventory stock alerts, and quick-action shortcuts to high-traffic workflows (patients, appointments, consultations, billing). Data must refresh automatically when the page is opened.
pages.purpose: Provide a single-screen overview of clinic health, financial performance, daily workload, and urgent inventory alerts.
features: 8 KPI metric cards in two rows
7-day revenue bar chart with daily totals
Performance indicators panel (revenue target, patient growth, consultation load, inventory health)
Stock alerts panel (low stock and expiring medicines)
Quick action buttons to navigate to core pages

functions.name: Refresh Statistics
functions.description: Load dashboard data from DashboardService.get_statistics() via AppController.get_dashboard_stats().

functions.name: Navigate Quick Action
functions.description: Jump to patients, appointments, consultations, or billing page from quick-action buttons.

functions.name: Display Stock Alerts
functions.description: Show low-stock and expiring medicine warnings; display 'All stock levels OK' when none.

functions.name: Render Revenue Chart
functions.description: Plot last 7 days of daily revenue collections as a bar chart.

pages.title: Patients
pages.prompt: Create a comprehensive patient registry for administrators. Support searchable patient lists with status statistics, a detailed profile form covering personal info, address, emergency contact, and PhilHealth/classification fields (Senior Citizen, PWD). Enforce duplicate-name detection before save. Allow archiving inactive patients without deleting records.
pages.purpose: Register, search, update, and archive patient demographic and insurance records.
features: Stat chips: total patients, active, archived
PhilHealth member details and classification (Senior Citizen, PWD with ID numbers)
form_fields: First name, middle name, last name
PhilHealth member number, category, member type
Senior Citizen flag and ID number

functions.name: New Patient
functions.description: Clear form and prepare for new patient registration.

functions.name: Save Patient
functions.description: Create or update patient via PatientService.register() or PatientService.update(); checks for duplicate names.

functions.name: Archive Patient
functions.description: Soft-archive patient record via PatientService.archive(); removes from active list.

functions.name: Search Patients
functions.description: Filter patient list by name or identifier via PatientService.search().

functions.name: Clear Form
functions.description: Reset all form fields and deselect current patient.

functions.name: Refresh
functions.description: Reload patient list and statistics.

pages.title: Appointments
pages.prompt: Build a daily appointment scheduler for clinic staff. Administrators can view appointments filtered by date, create new appointments linking patients to attending doctors, update status through the lifecycle (Scheduled → Confirmed → Completed/Cancelled/No Show), and cancel appointments. Show day-level statistics and a color-coded status legend.
pages.purpose: Schedule, track, and manage patient visit appointments by day.
features: Date filter for daily appointment view
Stat chips: total, scheduled, confirmed for selected day
Appointment form with patient, doctor, date, time, reason, status
Status legend: Scheduled, Confirmed, Completed, Cancelled, No Show

functions.name: New Appointment
functions.description: Clear form and prepare new appointment entry.

functions.name: Save Appointment
functions.description: Create or update appointment via AppointmentService.

functions.name: Cancel Appointment
functions.description: Set appointment status to Cancelled.

functions.name: Load Day
functions.description: Fetch and display all appointments for the selected date.

functions.name: Clear Form
functions.description: Reset appointment form fields.

functions.name: Refresh
functions.description: Reload appointment list for current date.

pages.title: Consultations
pages.prompt: Design a medical records page for documenting patient consultations. Administrators and doctors select a patient, view consultation history with status counts, and create or update consultation records including vitals (BP, heart rate, temperature, weight) and clinical notes (chief complaint, diagnosis, treatment plan, doctor notes). Support marking consultations as complete.
pages.purpose: Document and manage medical visit records and clinical notes per patient.
features: Consultation history list with loaded/active/completed counts

functions.name: New Consultation
functions.description: Start a new consultation record for the selected patient.

functions.name: Save Consultation
functions.description: Create or update consultation via ConsultationService.create() or ConsultationService.update().

functions.name: Mark Complete
functions.description: Set consultation status to completed via ConsultationService.complete().

functions.name: Load History
functions.description: Fetch all consultations for selected patient via ConsultationService.get_by_patient().

functions.name: Clear
functions.description: Reset consultation form.

functions.name: Refresh
functions.description: Reload consultation history for current patient.

pages.notes: Prescription backend exists (ConsultationService.create_prescription) but no dedicated prescription UI page.

pages.title: Inventory
pages.prompt: Build a medicine stock management module exclusive to administrators. Track medicines with generic/brand names, form, strength, stock levels, reorder thresholds, pricing, batch numbers, and expiry dates. Support adding new medicines, stock-in/stock-out adjustments, search, and highlight low-stock and expiring items.
pages.purpose: Manage pharmacy/medicine inventory, stock movements, and replenishment alerts.
features: Stat chips: low stock count, expiring soon count
Stock In / Stock Out adjustment controls
Add Medicine dialog for new entries

functions.name: Add Medicine
functions.description: Open dialog to register new medicine via InventoryService.add_medicine().

functions.name: Stock In
functions.description: Increase stock quantity via InventoryService.stock_in(); logs inventory transaction.

functions.name: Stock Out
functions.description: Decrease stock quantity via InventoryService.stock_out(); logs inventory transaction.

functions.name: Search
functions.description: Filter medicines by name via InventoryService.search().

functions.name: Refresh
functions.description: Reload medicine list and alert statistics.

pages.title: Billing
pages.prompt: Create a billing and payments module for administrators. Select a patient, build draft bills with line items, auto-add consultation fees from clinic settings, apply PhilHealth case rates, record payments (Cash, Check, Bank Transfer, GCash, Other), generate SOA PDFs, attach SOA XML for eClaims, and print receipts. Show patient billing history.
pages.purpose: Create bills, apply PhilHealth benefits, collect payments, and produce financial documents.
features: Draft line items (description, unit price, quantity)
Auto-add consultation fee from clinic settings
PhilHealth case rate picker and benefit application
Payment recording with multiple payment methods
Attach SOA XML to eClaims package

functions.name: New Bill
functions.description: Start a new billing draft for selected patient.

functions.name: Add Consultation Fee
functions.description: Auto-insert consultation fee line item from SettingsService clinic configuration.

functions.name: Add Item
functions.description: Add a custom line item to the draft bill.

functions.name: Create Bill
functions.description: Finalize bill via BillingService; persists Billing and BillingItem records.

functions.name: Clear Items
functions.description: Remove all draft line items.

functions.name: Apply PhilHealth & Pay
functions.description: Compute PhilHealth deductions and process payment in one workflow.

functions.name: Record Payment
functions.description: Record partial or full payment against an existing bill.

functions.name: Preview SOA
functions.description: Preview Statement of Account document before printing.

functions.name: Print SOA
functions.description: Generate and print SOA PDF via PDFGenerator.

functions.name: Attach XML to eClaims
functions.description: Generate SOA XML via soa_xml_generator and attach to eClaims package.

functions.name: Print Receipt
functions.description: Generate payment receipt PDF.

functions.name: Refresh
functions.description: Reload patient billing history.

pages.title: PhilHealth
pages.prompt: Build a PhilHealth benefits and claims management module with three tabs: (1) Benefit Computation — compute hospital share, professional fees, deductions, senior/PWD discounts, and patient balance; (2) Claim Forms — create and manage CF1–CF5 and CSF forms with eClaim transmission; (3) eClaims — monitor transmission log and manage claim packages. Support PDF generation, document attachment, and status tracking through the claim lifecycle.
pages.purpose: Compute PhilHealth benefits, manage claim forms, and transmit eClaims packages.
features: Tab 1 — Benefit Computation with transaction history
Tab 2 — Claim Forms (CF1, CF2, CF3, CF4, CF5, CSF)
Claim form status and eClaim status tracking
PDF generation for claim summaries and forms

functions.name: Compute Benefits
functions.description: Calculate hospital share (70%), professional fee (30%), deductions, senior/PWD discounts, and patient balance.

functions.name: Process Transaction
functions.description: Save PhilHealth transaction record after benefit computation.

functions.name: View History
functions.description: Display past PhilHealth transactions for selected patient.

functions.name: Print Summary PDF
functions.description: Export benefit computation summary as PDF.

functions.name: Create Claim Form
functions.description: Open modal dialog to create CF1–CF5 or CSF form.

functions.name: View Details
functions.description: Open claim form detail view.

functions.name: Transmit eClaim
functions.description: Package and transmit claim for eClaims processing.

functions.name: Print PDF
functions.description: Generate claim form PDF.

functions.name: Mark Submitted
functions.description: Update claim form status to submitted.

functions.name: Mark Approved
functions.description: Update claim form status to approved.

functions.name: Delete Draft
functions.description: Remove draft claim form.

functions.name: Refresh
functions.description: Reload claim forms table.

functions.name: Refresh
functions.description: Reload eClaims transmission log.

functions.name: Mark Acknowledged
functions.description: Update eClaim transmission status to acknowledged.

functions.name: Mark Rejected
functions.description: Update eClaim transmission status to rejected.

functions.name: Open Package Folder
functions.description: Open file system folder containing eClaim package files.

pages.title: Price List
pages.prompt: Build a PhilHealth Medical and Surgical case rate maintenance page. Administrators browse paginated case rates (50 per page), search by code or description, filter by type (All/Medical/Surgical), and perform CRUD on rates including case code, description, type, active flag, case rate, health facility fee, and professional fee. Track price-effective dates on edits.
pages.purpose: Browse and maintain PhilHealth case rate price list used in billing and benefit computation.
features: Stats bar: total rates, medical count, surgical count
Search by case code or description

functions.name: Add Rate
functions.description: Create new case rate via PhilHealthService.create_case_rate().

functions.name: Edit Rate
functions.description: Update existing case rate via PhilHealthService.update_case_rate().

functions.name: Delete Rate
functions.description: Remove case rate via PhilHealthService.delete_case_rate().

functions.name: Search
functions.description: Filter rates by keyword via PhilHealthService.search_rates().

functions.name: Previous Page
functions.description: Navigate to previous page of results.

functions.name: Next Page
functions.description: Navigate to next page of results.

functions.name: Refresh
functions.description: Reload rate list and type counts.

pages.title: Reports
pages.prompt: Create a reports export hub for administrators. Provide date range selection (From/To) with quick presets (Today, This Month, This Year). Display 10 report cards covering financial, clinical, inventory, and PhilHealth data. Each report exports to PDF or Excel via save-as dialog.
pages.purpose: Generate and export operational, financial, and clinical reports for administration and compliance.
features: Date range selector (From Date, To Date)
Quick select: Today, This Month, This Year
10 report type cards in scrollable grid
Export to PDF or Excel for each report

functions.name: Set Date Range
functions.description: Manually enter From/To dates or use quick-select presets.

functions.name: Export PDF
functions.description: Generate report as PDF via ReportGenerator; open save-as dialog.

functions.name: Export Excel
functions.description: Generate report as Excel via ReportGenerator; open save-as dialog.

pages.title: Settings
pages.prompt: Build the system administration hub with five internal sections: Hospital Info (clinic configuration), Users (account CRUD), Permissions (per-user page access overrides), Backup & Logs (database backup/restore and audit trail), and My Account (self-service credential changes). Use sub-navigation tabs within the Settings page.
pages.purpose: Centralize hospital configuration, user administration, permission management, data backup, and account self-service.

sections.title: Hospital Info
sections.prompt: Configure clinic/hospital identity and billing defaults used across receipts, reports, and PhilHealth forms.
sections.purpose: Maintain facility profile and billing configuration.
features: Tax ID and PhilHealth accreditation number

functions.name: Save Changes
functions.description: Persist clinic settings via SettingsService.update_settings().

functions.name: Reload
functions.description: Reload current settings from database via SettingsService.get_settings().

sections.title: Users
sections.prompt: Provide full user account management for administrators: create, edit, activate/deactivate, and reset passwords. Assign roles from Administrator, Receptionist, Doctor, Cashier.
sections.purpose: Manage staff user accounts and role assignments.
features: Stat chips: total users, active, inactive

functions.name: Add User
functions.description: Clear form for new user creation.

functions.name: Save User
functions.description: Create or update user via AuthService.create_user() or AuthService.update_user().

functions.name: Clear Form
functions.description: Reset user form fields.

functions.name: Reset Password
functions.description: Set new password via AuthService.reset_user_password().

functions.name: Activate/Deactivate
functions.description: Toggle user active status via AuthService.toggle_user_status().

functions.name: Search
functions.description: Filter user list by name or username.

functions.name: Refresh
functions.description: Reload user list and statistics.

sections.title: Permissions
sections.prompt: Allow administrators to override default role permissions on a per-user basis. Display checkboxes for all PAGE_PERMISSIONS pages. Show whether user uses custom or role-default permissions. Support reset to role defaults.
sections.purpose: Fine-grained per-user page access control beyond default role permissions.

functions.name: Save Permissions
functions.description: Persist custom permission set via AuthService.update_user_permissions().

functions.name: Reset to Role Defaults
functions.description: Remove custom overrides via AuthService.reset_user_permissions().

functions.name: Reload
functions.description: Reload permissions for selected user via AuthService.get_user_permissions().

sections.title: Backup & Logs
sections.prompt: Provide database backup and restore tools plus an activity audit log viewer showing the last 50 system actions with user, module, and description.
sections.purpose: Protect clinic data and review system activity audit trail.
features: Log entries show user, module, action description, timestamp

functions.name: Backup Database
functions.description: Export MySQL database dump via SettingsService.backup_database().

functions.name: Restore Database
functions.description: Import MySQL dump via SettingsService.restore_database(); requires confirmation.

functions.name: Refresh Logs
functions.description: Reload activity logs via SettingsService.get_activity_logs_enriched().

sections.title: My Account
sections.prompt: Allow the currently logged-in administrator to change their own username and password. Password change requires current password verification.
sections.purpose: Self-service credential management for the logged-in user.
features: Change password form with current password verification

functions.name: Update Username
functions.description: Change logged-in user's username via AuthService.change_username().

functions.name: Update Password
functions.description: Change logged-in user's password via AuthService.change_password().

audit_logging.description: Page visits and key actions are logged for compliance.

permission_enforcement.description: Sidebar items and page navigation gated by SessionManager.has_permission(page_key).
permission_enforcement.resolution: AuthService.resolve_permissions() at login from role defaults or per-user overrides.

view_refresh.description: Views auto-refresh when opened if data is older than VIEW_REFRESH_TTL_SEC.
